title: Death Note REMASTERED
description: Based on Japanese anime 'Death Note' • FOR NEW VERSIONS!!📓🍎
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/3cqkhRP.png)

# **Death Note in Minecraft! (Forge & NeoForge)**

- Use the Death Note carefully
- When used, you have to put in an apple for Ryuk for it to work
- The player mentioned in the book will be killed instantly
- Great for roleplay servers, or just to try out!

![the Death note](https://i.imgur.com/U8xQ3yx.png)
